title: Enigmatic Legacy Plus Retrieve to slots
description: A small addon for Enigmatic Legacy Plus that makes items from death crystals go to their respective inventory slots. Supports Curios and Cosmetic Armor
body: A small addon for 1.21.1 version of Enigmatic Legacy Plus that makes it so items stored in soul crystals after death go to their respective inventory slots when picked up. Supports Curios and Cosmetic Armor Slots. No more items randomly dropping in your inventory
